'''Kuras I''' was the first [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Kuras system/Legends|Kuras system]] of the [[Elrood sector/Legends|Elrood sector]]. It was a hot, rocky wasteland.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1993-09-XX -->''[[Planets of the Galaxy, Volume Three]]''
